message:
fix(batch): Remove prefetch import from generated batch build.zig

Critical fix for batch compilation failures:
- Removed relative import ../../utils/prefetch.zig from batch build
- This import path was invalid when build.zig is generated in .metal0/gen/
- Caused ALL batch compilations to fail with 'import of file outside module path'
- Prefetching is optimization, skip in batch builds (mainly useful for individual compilation)

Impact: Fixed 5 compile failures → 0 compile failures
Test progress: 0/6 passing → 2/6 passing (33.3%)
